title: Paraprasophyllum secutum
taxonomy: Paraprasophyllum secutum is a species of orchid native to Australia. It belongs to the family Orchidaceae. This classification puts it within the subfamily Orchidoideae and tribe Diurideae. The genus Paraprasophyllum is part of a larger group known as the 'hood orchids', which also includes the genus Prasophyllum. The specific classification of Paraprasophyllum secutum can be further broken down into its binomial nomenclature.

It has been used in traditional medicine for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may aid in the treatment of various ailments such as wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues.
